hooks.command: echo 'Remember: remove unused imports and run typecheck before committing TS files'
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then echo 'POST-COMMIT: verify lint-staged stash list and check for orphan stashes'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'npm run build'; then echo 'POST-BUILD: Check exit code. If prerender errors, check for missing force-dynamic or env var issues.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'npm test\|npx vitest\|npx playwright'; then echo 'POST-TEST: Review failures before proceeding. Do not skip failing tests.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'vercel --prod'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use CI/CD pipeline (gh pr create + merge) instead of direct vercel --prod'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push.*--force'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Force push is dangerous. Use git push without --force, or discuss with user first.'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q -- '--no-verify'; then echo 'BLOCKED: --no-verify bypasses safety hooks. Fix the underlying issue instead.'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git stash'; then echo 'WARNING: git stash can cause issues with lint-staged. Consider git commit (WIP) instead.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'supabase db push'; then echo 'WARNING: supabase db push applies migrations to remote DB. Verify target environment first.'; fi

INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; for f in .env .mcp.json package.json tsconfig.json vercel.json playwright.config.ts; do if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "$f"; then echo "WARNING: Writing to config file $f. Use Edit tool for surgical changes instead of Write to avoid overwriting existing config."; break; fi; done
